title: Jasminocereus thouarsii

This plant is a part of the genus Jasminocereus, which is a relatively small group of cacti. Jasminocereus thouarsii is native to the island of Réunion, where it grows in rocky areas and woodlands. The classification of this plant is also supported by its distinctive physical characteristics and growth habits.
